TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Himoti, title = Himoti, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Himoti} }

S.FORM: alang Himoti ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 230 buwan, 635 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 421 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 214 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 63%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Himoti hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Himoti hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Himoti hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Himoti hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Himoti hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'zil na Himoti hya' ga Cu ki ngo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Himoti ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Himoti ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 230 buwan, 635 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 421 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 214 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 63%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Himoti hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Himoti hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Himoti hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Himoti hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Himoti hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'zil na Himoti hya' ga Cu ki ngo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Himoti ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħimoti ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħimoti ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħimoti ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħimoti ħjaʔ ɣa kano ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ħimoti ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħimoti ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipuruŋan. taj ʔzil na ħimoti ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ħimoti ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
